text: Ethan lists his AI resources: Co-Intelligence, a NY Times bestseller now in 19 languages; the Generative AI Lab at Wharton with free prompts and research; and One Useful Thing, his free newsletter.

Ethan posts a satirical hype-thread format about Attention Is All You Need, explicitly framed as a reaction to many similar AI hype posts. The post uses overblown launch-thread language around RNNs, BLEU scores, Transformer, self-attention, and training cost.
Ethan says the previous post is a real Voight-Kampff test for bots on X.
Ethan says executives often ask which AI lab is winning or what is happening with a model in ways that clearly come from X discussions and rumors, often filtered through LinkedIn.
Ethan says an Atlantic article explains the swing from 'AI is a bubble' to 'there are not enough data centers' in less than six months, and he attributes the shift to agents.
